scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c green,cyan "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:backend: powershell -NoProfile -Command "if (Test-Path 'backend/.venv/Scripts/python.exe') { & 'backend/.venv/Scripts/python.exe' -m uvicorn app.main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --app-dir backend } else { python -m uvicorn app.main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --app-dir backend }"
